mentions.note: Called 'golden nugget' last year; down 50% from highs (halved); Cramer likes company and industry, requests deep-dive workup.

Data center backup power demand unstoppable; margin squeeze from capacity ramp temporary. Stock crushed 29% on earnings but metrics beat; trades 10x 2026 EPS vs. CAT 31x, CUMMINS 21x. Overly punished.
